title: Class 377 Retexture's
description: A collection of retextured Class 377's for the MTR mod
body:
# Class 377 Retexture's

A collection of Class 377 retextures for the MTR mod. Targets MTR 4, and does not support MTR 3 as of v1.1

# Contributing

If you would like to add your own retexture's, please see the [GitHub repo](https://github.com/AwesomeKalin/MTR-ResourcePacks/tree/master/Class-377-Retexture)

# Retexture's

Here is a list of retexture's:

<details>
<summary>Retexture's</summary>

 - I... Am Steve - By AwesomeKalin55
 - Pink Sheep - By AwesomeKalin55
 - Southeastern - By AwesomeKalin55

</details>

<details>
  <summary>Planned Retextures</summary>
  
   - VIP 377
   - Avanti West Coast 377
   - TPE 377
</details>

If you want screenshots of places where you have used this resource pack uploaded to the Gallery, please either open an issue on GitHub, or ping me in the Screenshot Discussion of your post in the MTR discord server, and I'll put it here. Max 2 per person
